hero.subtitle: Cross-border and domestic shipments powered by modern digital systems, GPS tracking, and vehicle management — delivering safety and speed across Ethiopia and beyond.

services.label: Our Services
services.subtitle: From vehicle tracking to load management, we provide everything you need for efficient and reliable freight operations.
services.fleet_mgmt_desc: Track your vehicles in real time as drivers complete jobs. Tracking is available via GPS devices mounted on trucks, GPS signals from driver mobile phones, or both. Always know where your trucks have been, and see where they are headed.
services.cargo_desc: Real time visibility into shipment progress from the moment a driver is assigned to the load through the moment the truck has arrived and unloaded. Get alerted immediately about any updates or delays, via our web and mobile apps.
services.vetted_desc: We collect hundreds of data points on every job, providing deep insights into the reliability of our carriers and drivers, vetted for trustworthiness. Custom solutions available for high risk cargo.
services.loads_title: Choose Loads That Work For You
services.loads_desc: Use our load board to find and request loads on your preferred routes. Get notified when jobs are available on routes that you or your drivers prefer.
services.comms_desc: Provide updates on your job with the press of a button, a text message, or just by having your phone on! No need for constant calls to update progress.

fleet.label: Our Fleet
fleet.desc: A growing fleet of modern vehicles strategically positioned across Ethiopia for maximum efficiency and minimal transit times. Every truck is GPS-enabled and maintained to the highest safety standards.

award.title: Award-Winning Service Provider
award.desc_1: Recognized by industry leaders. Proud recipient of the
award.desc_2: for the implementation of health and safety standards, awarded by

cta.title: Ready to Streamline Your Fleet?
cta.desc: Join the modern logistics revolution. Access real-time tracking, intelligent reporting, and complete fleet visibility in one powerful dashboard.

footer.tagline: Trusted logistics partner providing cross-border and domestic shipping services for over 23 years.
